title: Court-Martial
writer: Elmer Harris, Anthony Coldeway, Mort Blumenstock
actors: Jack Holt, Betty Compson, Pat Harmon
plot: During the American Civil War, A Union-Army officer is ordered by U. S. President Abraham Lincoln to bring in Belle Starr, the leader of a Missouri guerrilla band, dead or alive. However, he falls in love with her, does not bring ...
